framework.name: Okta's Sell-The-Problem-Sell-The-Solution Pattern
framework.description: Okta admits OAuth/JWT composition doesn't solve multi-hop delegation (no offline attenuation, no lineage after 3 hops), then sells their proprietary products (XAA, Token Vault, FGA) as the fix — built ON TOP of OAuth. They're simultaneously the strongest evidence that composition doesn't work AND the strongest vendor pushing composition.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
